respective sectors/industry. 
Thematic funds invest in stocks across a specific theme. These funds focus on specific themes 
or trends in the market. The themes can be based on economic trends, social changes, 
technological advancements etc. Examples of these funds are MNC funds, PSU (public sector 
units) funds, energy funds. Compared to sectoral fund thematic funds are more broad-based, as
